public_reputation: Commander of quay order, inspection flow, and disciplined departures in Silent Haven.
manner: Carries the habits of a harbormaster whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Silent Haven.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of harbormaster in and around Silent Haven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Silent Haven workable through the obligations of harbormaster while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of harbormaster credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Silent Haven.

adventure_hooks.summary: Harbormaster Neris Coalwake can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Silent Haven.
Harbormaster Neris Coalwake becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a harbormaster.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Harbormaster Neris Coalwake is readable as a harbormaster tied to Silent Haven.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Silent Haven: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Harbormaster Neris Coalwake presents as someone shaped by the duties of a harbormaster and the daily pressures of Silent Haven.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a harbormaster, and proof that strangers will not make Silent Haven harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Harbormaster Neris Coalwake refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a harbormaster too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Harbormaster Neris Coalwake can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Harbormaster Neris Coalwake adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Harbormaster Neris Coalwake always knows more about Silent Haven than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to harbormaster duties in Silent Haven.
